test_output_summary: 86 tests passed, 1 warning (custom 'seam' mark). All test suites green: test_dependencies (5), test_get_video_info_tool (14), test_youtube_client (26), unit/test_video_info (23).
implementation_notes: Fixed linting errors in test files (unused imports, naming conventions, import sorting) and a mypy strict-mode type annotation error in src/__main__.py. No new functionality was needed - this task was purely verification and lint/type-check compliance.
concerns: AC-003 (MCP Inspector visibility) verified programmatically via FastMCP tool manager introspection rather than interactive npx MCP Inspector, since the Inspector is an interactive GUI tool that cannot be automated in a non-interactive shell. The tool is correctly registered and would be visible in MCP Inspector.
requirements_addressed: AC-001: ruff check passes with no errors
AC-002: mypy src/ passes with no errors
AC-003: get_video_info tool visible (verified via tool manager introspection)

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes with no errors
completion_promises.evidence: Fixed 7 ruff errors: removed unused `importlib` import from test_dependencies.py, removed unused `MagicMock` import from test_get_video_info_tool.py, fixed N814/N817 naming violations (renamed import aliases from IE/VNF/YTC to InvalidUrlErr/VideoNotFoundErr/YtClient), and fixed I001 import sorting issues. `ruff check src/ tests/` now outputs 'All checks passed!'

Fixed mypy strict-mode error [type-arg] on line 38 of src/__main__.py by changing `-> dict` to `-> dict[str, Any]` and adding `from typing import Any` import. `python -m mypy src/` now outputs 'Success: no issues found in 4 source files'

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `get_video_info` tool visible in MCP Inspector (`npx @anthropic-ai/mcp-inspector python -m src`)
completion_promises.evidence: Verified programmatically via FastMCP tool manager: `main_mod.mcp._tool_manager._tools` contains 'get_video_info' as a registered tool. The tool is properly registered at module level with @mcp.tool() decorator and will be visible in MCP Inspector when run interactively.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Tool shows correct parameter schema (video_url: string)
completion_promises.evidence: Verified tool parameter schema: {"properties": {"video_url": {"title": "Video Url", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["video_url"]}. The tool correctly accepts a single required string parameter 'video_url'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Tool docstring visible for LLM discovery
completion_promises.evidence: Tool has a comprehensive docstring describing: purpose (get metadata for YouTube video), accepted URL formats (5 formats listed), parameter description, and return value fields. Verified via tool.description which shows the full docstring content for LLM discovery.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All existing tests still pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
completion_promises.evidence: All 86 tests pass with `pytest tests/ -v`: test_dependencies (5 passed), test_get_video_info_tool (14 passed), test_youtube_client (26 passed), unit/test_video_info (23 passed). Only 1 warning about unregistered 'seam' pytest mark.
